messages.content: i had youtube shorts from boat founder aman gupta podcast with ranveer allahbadia at ranveer allahbadia channel in which aman gupta says "मेरी मदर को भी स्ट्रेस हुआ था कि मैं डॉटर मेंड्ढr गुड हाउस। गाय पढ़ालिखा आदमी है। शीला की नौकरी छोड़ दी। अब बिजनेस करेगा और उसका भी कुछ पता नहीं क्या होगा। स्वदेशी टैक्स्ट मतलब जब मैं को मिलती थी ना कैसा उनको मेरी आंखों में दिखता था कि उन्हें स्ट्रैस हो रहा है कि यार बेटी कमाती है और यह निकम्मा निकल रहा है। मेरा दामाद तो जितना आप गिनकर सीख सकते हो, जितना हार्डवर्क से सीख सकते हो, जितना आप गिरकर सीख सकते हो ना, उतना किसी चीज से नहीं सीख सकते। तो मैं बहुत सिखाऊंगा अपनी पुरानी फेलियर से। और मेरी सबसे बड़ी लर्निंग मेरे फेलियर आया।" now make strong SEO title for my youtube shorts
"Boat Founder Aman Gupta's Struggle Before Success | Life-Changing Lessons Learned From Failure"
"#AmanGupta | Unveiling The Tough Road To Success"

"Boat's Aman Gupta shares his raw and inspiring journey on Ranveer Allahbadia's podcast. From facing his mother's stress over quitting a well-paying job to the uncertainties of starting a business, Gupta's story is a testament to perseverance and learning from failure. Watch as he reveals the stress and struggles that led to his valuable life lessons — a must-watch for every entrepreneur. #AmanGupta #Success #Entrepreneurship #LearningFromFailure #Motivation #BoatStory"

"Dive into the gritty realities of entrepreneurship with Boat Co-founder Aman Gupta. On Ranveer Allahbadia's podcast, Gupta discloses the pressures of leaving a stable job, tackling business uncertainties, and how even his family's doubts fueled his drive. Witness his candid conversation about overcoming setbacks and utilizing failure as the cornerstone of success. Tune in for a motivational dose of Gupta's experiences, mistakes, and triumphs. #AmanGupta #EntrepreneurialJourney #OvercomingObstacles #BusinessInsights #Inspiration"
